arts.ttl: PSG, Real Madrid Can Afford €100M-Rated Bayern Munich Transfer Target
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen’s attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz will be in high demand next summer transfer window. Wirtz is shaping up to be the hottest target of the 2025 summer transfer window, with Bayern Munich and Real Madrid both eager to land the 21-year-old. arts.ttl: Liverpool Monitor PSG’s €50M-Rated Talent Amid Limited Minutes
arts.sum: A few days ago, a report revealed that Paris Saint-Germain newcomer Désiré Doué is disappointed with how his first few months in the French capital have gone after he joined the current Ligue 1 champions this past summer. Moreover, these three clubs would have received good news as contract extension talks between the Italian side and the player aren’t progressing. arts.ttl: PSG Standout Had No Interest in Real Madrid Reunion With Mbappé
arts.sum: On Thursday, RMC Sport reported that Achraf Hakimi has extended his contract with Paris Saint-Germain until 2029. Despite the rumors linking him to Real Madrid, the 26-year-old will stay in the French capital for a long time. The Morocco international’s current deal was set to expire in 2026, but two more years have been added. arts.ttl: Liverpool Set to Have £17M Offer for PSG Transfer Target Rejected
arts.sum: Last week, Olympique Lyonnais received a significant sanction from the DNCG (Direction Nationale du Contrôle de Gestion), placing the club under substantial financial pressure. While the Ligue 1 side have to sell players, they are holding out for prices they believe are suitable. arts.ttl: Barcelona Are Long Admirers of Liverpool, PSG’s €80M-Rated Transfer Target

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s €60M-Rated Star Faces Ultimatum Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s future at Manchester United could be decided during the 2024-25 season, with Ruben Amorim now in charge. arts.ttl: Juventus eye Skriniar as Luis Enrique states: “When you don’t play, you’re unhappy”
arts.sum: Milan Skriniar remains Juve’s prime target as they look to reinforce a beleaguered back-line. The former Inter Milan centre-back, now at Paris Saint-Germain, has found himself on the fringes of the team, making only four appearances this season, with just three as a starter. Calciomercato report how Skriniar’s situation at PSG has become increasingly frustrating for the player. He has been consistently left on the bench during Champions League matches, where the Parisian club has struggled, securing only one win in four games. arts.ttl: Nuno Mendes and Senny Mayulu absent for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be without Nuno Mendes (22) and Senny Mayulu (18) for Friday night’s encounter against Toulouse FC. Mayulu’s period of absence is estimated at two weeks, meaning that…

arts.ttl: Man Utd IN TALKS to sign PSG star on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United are in talks with Paris Saint-Germain over a possible loan deal for Randal Kolo-Muani, according to reports. French outlet Le10sport have reported that the Premier League giants are looking to bring the out-of-favour Frenchman on loan.
